result.stdout:
Determine whether a remote web server is accessible over the network.

Usage: Ping [options]

Options:
  -h|--host <HOST>        Host name with schema, http://www.zkea.net
  -t|--timeout <TIMEOUT>  Timeout seconds.
                          Default value is: 0.
  -?|--help               Show help information.
